toolbar.add_project_tip: Add this project to the active settings.json
toolbar.sync_versions_tip: Set all visible projects to the highest version among them
settings.title: Settings
settings.body:
settings.json has been opened in the editor.

Click OK after saving to reload the settings.
settings.history_help: Max. entries in recent-file lists (Settings + VERSION)
settings.name: Name:
settings.lists_help:
Lists — Reference

Syntax:
  name: value1, value2, value3

Range expansion:
  stage: -alpha{1-3}, -beta    →  -alpha1, -alpha2, -alpha3, -beta
  build: v{01-09}              →  v01, v02, … v09

Usage in format string:
  [sem]{stage}                 →  adds a 4th button with list values
  [{#major}.{#minor}]{stage}

Multiple lists:
  env:   -dev, -staging, -prod
  stage: -alpha{1-3}, -beta, -rc
settings.format_tip:
Format string — examples:
  [sem]                          → 1.2.3  (SemVer with reset)
  {#major}.{#minor}              → no reset
  {YYYY}.{MM}.{#build}           → 2026.03.47
  {YYYY}.[{#major}.{#minor}.{#patch}]
  [{#major}.{#minor}]-{alpha|beta|prod}
  [{#major}.{#minor}]-{a-c}      → inline list: a, b, c
  {stage}                        → from global list
  [*8]                           → free text, max. 8 chars
settings.per_project_ignore: Per-project ignore  (prefix ! to re-include a global entry)
settings.ignore_dirs_tip:
One entry per line.
Prefix ! to re-include a global entry, e.g. !bin
settings.ignore_files_tip:
One pattern per line (e.g. *.bak).
Prefix ! to re-include a global pattern.
